stages.goal_intake: Validate S4 rows and preserve corporate actions explicitly with fail-closed factor semantics.
Compute versioned point-in-time features from admitted S5 rows with exact windows and missingness rules.
Run a deterministic research-only backtest with explicit timing, costs, slippage, ledger, and metrics.
Expose aligned read-only product data, quality state, formulas, as-of state, and provenance locally.
Verify the complete S1–S8 research-only chain is reproducible, inspectable, and safe to hand off.

global_rules: Human approval is required before S5 starts.
A stage may advance only after generated evidence status is pass.
Three consecutive failed acceptance attempts stop the sequence and request review.
Any hard stop or unplanned design fork stops immediately and asks for direction.
Every stage keeps a summary, command results, digests, changed-file list, and evidence artifact.
LH remains an external driver and does not own this repository.
No credentials, private data, FinMind, live trading, commit, push, or automatic promotion.

final_acceptance.required: S5, S6, S7, S8, and S9 evidence all pass
